title: Compliance Manager (Asset Management) (Contract)
description:
• Ensure ongoing adherence to MAS licensing requirements and alignment of local compliance policies with global standards.
  • Provide practical, business-focused compliance guidance to senior stakeholders on regulatory developments and daily operational matters.
  • Partner with business teams to review new initiatives and proactively identify and address compliance risks.
  • Prepare and present board and committee papers, as well as monthly compliance reports for Global Compliance.
  • Implement compliance monitoring programmes, including reviews of marketing and distribution activities.
  • Oversee the identification, escalation, and remediation of compliance breaches.
  • Design and deliver compliance training for new hires and periodic refresher sessions for existing staff.

Requirements

  • Prior experience in compliance within asset management or investment firms.
  • Familiarity with fund management processes (investment, trade compliance, sales & marketing) and financial crime prevention (AML, ABC, fraud, sanctions).
  • Understanding of risk management, internal controls, and compliance standards.

Interested applicants please send your resume in MS Word format and attention it to Rachel Yeo (R22104385).

Shortlisted candidates will be notified

Data provided is for recruitment purposes only

www.ambition.com.sg

postedCompany.description:
Ambition is a leading global recruitment and executive search business operating across key international cities. We access hard-to-find, high-calibre professionals within Banking & Financial Services, Finance & Accounting, Sales & Marketing, Supply Chain & Procurement, and Technology.

We believe our size is a significant differentiation in the recruitment industry. We are big enough to undertake large-scale projects for our clients, yet retain the soul and personality of a smaller company. We are best known for our specialisation with in-depth knowledge and expertise, well-established networks, and deep relationships. We work towards ‘building better futures’ for our clients, candidates and our community.

For more information, please visit www.ambition.com.sg or follow us on Ambition’s social media.
